content.text: Scale the deployment: change replicas from 2 to 4 and update the matching resource-tier label.

content.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api
  labels:
    tier: small
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: deploy/api.yaml
@@
   labels:
-    tier: small
-  name: api
+    tier: medium
+  name: api
 spec:
-  replicas: 2
+  replicas: 4
   selector:
*** End Patch

content.content:
Successfully applied patch to the following files:
deploy/api.yaml
